item.description: ### Fixed - Codex integration: Perch now checks whether Codex is actually *running* the hooks it installed. Codex asks you to approve a hook before it will run it, so the integration could show as on while doing nothing — no live session state, no "needs you" alerts, and no Allow/Deny. Settings now says when that's the case and which entries to approve with `/hooks` in Codex, including after a Perch update changes them.
